name: Project Atlas
description: Core distributed services platform. Backbone of every customer-facing product.

name: Nebula
description: Security platform modernization. Replaces three legacy SIEM and EDR tools with a unified detection plane.

name: Phoenix
description: Migration off the legacy monolith to the Atlas service mesh. Completed 2025-Q4 with the postmortem in project_phoenix_postmortem.md.

name: Phoenix 2.0
description: Successor effort to Phoenix. Re-architects the auth and tenancy layer that Phoenix deferred.

name: Aurora
description: New product line targeting mid-market analytics. Pre-launch; positioning is a closely held secret.

name: Helix
description: Replacement of the legacy HRIS. Touches sensitive employee records during cutover.

name: Atlas Mobile
description: Mobile client spin-off of the Atlas core platform. Naming intentionally mirrors the parent project.

name: Compass
description: Sales enablement platform. Deal collateral, playbooks, and pricing tooling.

name: Beacon
description: Marketing automation overhaul. Drip campaigns, attribution, and CRM integration.

name: Fortress
description: Internal incident response platform. Implements the IR playbook end to end.

name: Horizon
description: Acquisition target evaluation. Identity of the target is restricted to the listed members.

name: Cascade
description: Billing and revenue recognition migration. Crosses Finance and Engineering domains.

name: Meridian-X
description: Skunkworks initiative. Currently on hold pending Horizon outcome.

name: Trinity
description: Compliance automation across SOC 2, ISO 27001, and GDPR controls.

name: Voyager
description: Customer data platform. Unifies behavioral, transactional, and support telemetry.

name: Harbor
description: Vendor security assessment program. Owns third-party risk reviews and continuous monitoring.
